caption: A man with blonde hair, glasses, and a mustache wearing a dark blue shirt, a gold chain, and white over-ear headphones is reacting to a football video game. Initially, he looks directly at the camera with a neutral expression, but his face quickly transitions to an excited, open-mouthed smile. He then becomes highly animated, shouting with a wide-open mouth while raising his hand toward his head. The background features a monitor displaying a blue screen with the number "20". The final scene shifts to a gameplay screen from a football simulation, showing a wide shot of a stadium with the text "SELECT A PLAY" and "SAVE RANHO" visible. The game interface displays team scores as "14" and "7", the time as "3:22", and a play-calling menu with options like "COVER 4 QUARTERS". A small inset window continues to show the man reacting in his room.
